scripts.release:core:check: pnpm test && pnpm check && pnpm build && rm -rf tmp && mkdir -p tmp && pnpm pack:core && pnpm verify:core-consumer
scripts.release:studio:check: pnpm --filter @stampy/studio test && pnpm --filter @stampy/studio check && pnpm --filter @stampy/studio build && rm -rf tmp && mkdir -p tmp && pnpm pack:core && pnpm pack:studio && pnpm verify:studio-cli && pnpm verify:studio-consumer
scripts.release:kit:check: pnpm --filter @stampy/kit test && pnpm --filter @stampy/kit check && pnpm --filter @stampy/kit build && rm -rf tmp && mkdir -p tmp && pnpm pack:core && pnpm pack:studio && pnpm pack:kit && pnpm verify:kit-consumer
